Package com.ibm.cloud.dph_services.dph.v1.model

Class ContractLogicalTypeOptions

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
      • com.ibm.cloud.dph_services.dph.v1.model.ContractLogicalTypeOptions
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.ObjectModel
    public class ContractLogicalTypeOptions
extends com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
    Additional options for the logical type (e.g., format, minimum, maximum).

    • Method Detail

      • newBuilder

        public ContractLogicalTypeOptions.Builder newBuilder()
        New builder.
        Returns:
        a ContractLogicalTypeOptions builder

      • format

        public java.lang.String format()
        Gets the format. Format specification for the logical type (e.g., 'date-time', 'email', 'uuid').
        Returns:
        the format

      • minimum

        public java.lang.String minimum()
        Gets the minimum. Minimum value for numeric types or minimum date/time.
        Returns:
        the minimum

      • maximum

        public java.lang.String maximum()
        Gets the maximum. Maximum value for numeric types or maximum date/time.
        Returns:
        the maximum

      • minLength

        public java.lang.Long minLength()
        Gets the minLength. Minimum length for string types.
        Returns:
        the minLength

      • maxLength

        public java.lang.Long maxLength()
        Gets the maxLength. Maximum length for string types.
        Returns:
        the maxLength

      • pattern

        public java.lang.String pattern()
        Gets the pattern. Regular expression pattern for string validation.
        Returns:
        the pattern

      • exclusiveMaximum

        public java.lang.String exclusiveMaximum()
        Gets the exclusiveMaximum. Values must be strictly less than this (string for date/timestamp, number for integer/number).
        Returns:
        the exclusiveMaximum

      • exclusiveMinimum

        public java.lang.String exclusiveMinimum()
        Gets the exclusiveMinimum. Values must be strictly greater than this (string for date/timestamp, number for integer/number).
        Returns:
        the exclusiveMinimum

      • timezone

        public java.lang.Boolean timezone()
        Gets the timezone. Whether timezone is included (for logicalType='timestamp' or 'time').
        Returns:
        the timezone

      • defaultTimezone

        public java.lang.String defaultTimezone()
        Gets the defaultTimezone. Default timezone (default: 'Etc/UTC') (for logicalType='timestamp' or 'time').
        Returns:
        the defaultTimezone

      • multipleOf

        public java.lang.Double multipleOf()
        Gets the multipleOf. Values must be multiples of this (for logicalType='integer' or 'number').
        Returns:
        the multipleOf

      • maxProperties

        public java.lang.Long maxProperties()
        Gets the maxProperties. Maximum number of properties (for logicalType='object').
        Returns:
        the maxProperties

      • minProperties

        public java.lang.Long minProperties()
        Gets the minProperties. Minimum number of properties (default: 0) (for logicalType='object').
        Returns:
        the minProperties

      • required

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> required()
        Gets the required. Property names that must exist in the object (for logicalType='object').
        Returns:
        the required

      • maxItems

        public java.lang.Long maxItems()
        Gets the maxItems. Maximum number of items (for logicalType='array').
        Returns:
        the maxItems

      • minItems

        public java.lang.Long minItems()
        Gets the minItems. Minimum number of items (default: 0) (for logicalType='array').
        Returns:
        the minItems

      • uniqueItems

        public java.lang.Boolean uniqueItems()
        Gets the uniqueItems. Whether all items must be unique (default: false) (for logicalType='array').
        Returns:
        the uniqueItems
